_comment: Synthetic AU Small Finance Bank savings golden vector (no real data). Ported from the web engine's au_bank.py; captured from a live run + balance_chain.check (RECONCILED). Single template: two DD Mon YYYY dates then Debit/Credit columns where the empty side prints a dash '-', then the running balance. Direction is from the balance delta, NEVER the UPI/DR / UPI/CR counterparty text in the narration. printed_closing_balance is the last row's running balance (16570.79), not the header's printed Closing Balance (223.34).
